childhood.familyBackground: Born to working-class Norwegian fishing family.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 노동자 계급 노르웨이 어업 가정에서 출생.
childhood.earlyLife: Worked as Alaskan fishing trawler operator; built American Seafoods Corporation; expanded into shipping and industrial holdings via Aker ASA.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 알래스카 어업 트롤러 운영자로 근무; American Seafoods Corporation 구축; Aker ASA를 통해 해운·산업 보유로 확장.

careerTimeline.event: Worked as Alaskan trawler operator; began building American Seafoods.
careerTimeline.eventKo: 알래스카 트롤러 운영자로 근무; American Seafoods 구축 시작.

careerTimeline.event: Acquired Aker Maritime; expanded into offshore oil services and Norwegian industrial conglomerate.
careerTimeline.eventKo: Aker Maritime 인수; 해상 석유 서비스·노르웨이 산업 그룹으로 확장.

careerTimeline.event: Aker ASA expanded across oil services, shipping, seafood, and other Norwegian industrial sectors.
careerTimeline.eventKo: Aker ASA가 석유 서비스·해운·해산물·기타 노르웨이 산업 부문으로 확장.

careerTimeline.event: Personal net worth at $8.3B per Forbes Real-Time. Continues Aker ASA chairman.
careerTimeline.eventKo: 포브스 실시간 기준 개인 순자산 83억 달러. Aker ASA 의장 계속.

moneyMechanics.primaryRevenueKo: Aker ASA + American Seafoods + 노르웨이 산업 그룹
moneyMechanics.luckVsSkillKo: 운(40%): 노르웨이 자원 시대. 실력(60%): 어업→산업 변환.

personalTraits.knownFor: Founder of Aker ASA, American Seafoods; one of Norway's wealthiest self-made industrialists.
personalTraits.knownForKo: Aker ASA·American Seafoods 창립자; 노르웨이 가장 부유한 자수성가 산업가 중 한 명.
personalTraits.philanthropy: REV Ocean philanthropic initiative on ocean conservation; major Norwegian education and arts support.
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 해양 보전에 대한 REV Ocean 자선 사업; 주요 노르웨이 교육·예술 지원.
personalTraits.controversies: 1990s Norwegian tax-avoidance debates; some Aker operational issues; standard Norwegian industrial-magnate political-business commentary.
personalTraits.controversiesKo: 1990년대 노르웨이 세금 회피 논쟁; 일부 Aker 운영 문제; 표준 노르웨이 산업 거물 정치-사업 코멘터리.

failures.description: 2008 financial crisis impacted Aker shipping and industrial operations.
failures.lesson: Industrial diversification still faces macro risk.

failures.description: COVID-19 affected oil services and global shipping.

quotes.text: I started fishing in Alaska. I never stopped working with the ocean.
quotes.textKo: 나는 알래스카에서 어업을 시작했다. 바다와 함께 일하는 것을 결코 멈추지 않았다.

sajuConnection.summary: Eul-Hae day pillar in Sul month — 'jeongin-gyeok', maternal-academic foundation, fitting self-taught Nordic industrialist.
sajuConnection.summaryKo: 을해 일주 + 술월 정인격은 노르웨이 자수성가 산업가 정체성과 호응.
